# Joe Rogan Experience Transcripts

> Timestamped transcripts of 1,940 Joe Rogan Experience podcast episodes in Markdown format.

This repository contains machine-generated transcripts (from YouTube auto-captions) of the Joe Rogan Experience podcast. Each episode is a single Markdown file with timestamped caption lines. The transcripts cover the main show, MMA shows, Fight Companions, and special episodes.

## Repository structure

- [README](https://github.com/RohitWaghire/Joe-Rogan-Experience-Transcripts/blob/main/README.md): Overview, file format, usage examples, and disclaimer.
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/RohitWaghire/Joe-Rogan-Experience-Transcripts/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT license (applies to repo structure, not episode content).
- [Transcripts/](https://github.com/RohitWaghire/Joe-Rogan-Experience-Transcripts/tree/main/Transcripts): All 1,940 episode transcript files.

## Transcript file format

Each `.md` file follows this structure:

```
# Joe Rogan Experience #<number> - <guest>
# https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=<video_id>
# video_id: <video_id>

[MM:SS] caption text
[MM:SS] caption text
...
```

## File naming convention

```
Joe Rogan Experience #<episode> - <guest> [<YouTube video ID>].md
```

Variations include `JRE MMA Show #<n>`, `JRE Fight Companion`, and a few special episodes.

## Key details

- **Source**: YouTube auto-generated captions
- **Format**: Markdown with `[MM:SS]` timestamps
- **Limitations**: No speaker labels, occasional transcription errors typical of auto-captions
- **Episode range**: #1 through recent episodes, plus MMA shows and Fight Companions
- **License**: MIT for repo structure; episode content belongs to Joe Rogan / JRE

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/RohitWaghire/Joe-Rogan-Experience-Transcripts)
